items.title: [正面] I got the game on mobile first, with the thought b...
items.summary: I got the game on mobile first, with the thought being that it would be an easy quick thing to play for a few minutes at a time. I was very surprised by the writing, and ultimately had to get it on steam because it was too good to just skip through for the combat bits. Excellent story telling, very complex and engaging combat and intriguing character design. I also expected the PVP mode to be kind of "tacked on" but it has been incredibly fun and very well balanced and diverse. Thoroughly recommend this game regardless of what interests you about it, each aspect alone is enough to be worth picking it up for (not to mention it's free)
